title.en: Bolt Tightening and Torque Guide: Proper Installation Methods
title.zh: 螺栓紧固和扭矩指南：正确的安装方法
title.es: Guía de Apriete de Pernos y Par Motor: Métodos de Instalación Correctos
title.ar: دليل شد البراغي وعزم الدوران: طرق التثبيت الصحيحة
title.fr: Guide de Serrage et de Couple des Boulons: Méthodes d'Installation Correctes
title.pt: Guia de aperto e torque de parafusos: Métodos de instalação corretos
title.ru: Руководство по Затяжке и Моменту Затяжки Болтов: Правильные Методы Установки
title.ja: ボルト締付けとトルクガイド：適切な取付け方法
title.hi: बोल्ट टाइटनिंग और टॉर्क गाइड: उचित स्थापना विधियां

description.en: Complete guide to bolt tightening and torque specifications. Learn proper torque values, tightening methods, and preload calculation for reliable bolted joints.
description.zh: 螺栓紧固和扭矩规格完整指南。了解正确的扭矩值、紧固方法和预紧力计算，以获得可靠的螺栓连接。
description.es: Guía completa de especificaciones de par de apriete de pernos. Aprenda valores de torque, métodos de apriete y cálculo de precarga.
description.ar: دليل شامل لمواصفات عزم دوران شد البراغي. تعلم قيم عزم الدوران الصحيحة وطرق الشد وحساب الخضوع المسبق.
description.fr: Guide complet des spécifications de couple de serrage des boulons. Apprenez les valeurs de couple correctes, les méthodes de serrage et le calcul de précharge.
description.pt: Guia completo de especificações de torque de aperto de parafusos. Aprenda valores de torque corretos, métodos de aperto e cálculo de pré-carga.
description.ru: Полное руководство по характеристикам момента затяжки болтов. Узнайте правильные значения крутящего момента, методы затяжки и расчет предварительной нагрузки.
description.ja: ボルト締付けとトルク仕様の完全ガイド。適切なトルク値、締付け方法、予緊張力計算について学びます。
description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden für Schrauben Anziehdrehmoment. Lernen Sie korrekte Drehmomentwerte, Anziehmethoden und Vorspannungsberechnung.
description.hi: बोल्ट टाइटनिंग और टॉर्क स्पेसिफिकेशन की पूर्ण गाइड। उचित टॉर्क वैल्यू, टाइटनिंग विधियां, और विश्वसनीय बोल्टेड जॉइंट के लिए प्रीलोड कैलकुलेशन सीखें।

keywords: bolt torque, tightening methods, preload, torque specification, bolted joint, torque wrench

body.en:
Proper bolt tightening creates clamp force (preload) that holds the joint together:

Torque Formula:
T = K × F × d

Where:
- T = Torque (Nm or ft-lb)
- K = Nut factor (typically 0.2)
- F = Desired preload (N or lb)
- d = Nominal bolt diameter (m or ft)

Preload Requirements:
- Joint design determines required preload
- Too little: Joint may separate
- Too much: Bolt may yield or fail

Typical preload: 60-75% of bolt proof load

Typical torque values for metric hex bolts:

Grade 8.8 Bolts:
- M8: 25-30 Nm
- M10: 50-60 Nm
- M12: 85-95 Nm
- M16: 210-240 Nm
- M20: 410-460 Nm
- M24: 710-800 Nm

Grade 10.9 Bolts:
- M8: 35-40 Nm
- M10: 70-80 Nm
- M12: 120-135 Nm
- M16: 295-330 Nm
- M20: 580-650 Nm
- M24: 1000-1100 Nm

Note: Values are approximate and depend on lubrication condition.

Different methods for achieving proper preload:

1. Torque Wrench Method:
- Most common method
- Direct torque measurement
- Accuracy ±10-20%
- Requires calibrated wrench

2. Angle Turn Method:
- Turn bolt specific angle after snug
- More accurate than torque
- Requires experienced operator
- Common: 60-90° after snug

3. Hydraulic Tensioner:
- Uses hydraulic pressure
- Very accurate preload
- Used for large bolts (M36+)
- Expensive equipment

4. Combined Method:
- Torque to 50-60% of target
- Angle turn remaining amount
- Best accuracy and repeatability
